name: Banqi (Dark Chess)
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Banqi / Dark Chess (暗棋): all 32 xiangqi pieces are shuffled face-down onto a 4x8 half-board. Flip a piece, step one square, or capture down the rank ladder — soldiers fell the general, and cannons snipe anything by jumping a screen. Taiwanese ruleset. Whoever cannot move loses.
